caption: A news broadcast focuses on political updates, featuring a split-screen layout with a central image of a man in a white shirt and a large building in the background. To the left and right of this central image are smaller portraits of various political figures, including "सब्रत चौधरी", "विजय सिन्हा", "संतोष सुमन", and "सुमित कुमार". Text overlays indicate election data, stating "2019 लोक सभा कुल सीटें 42" and "कांग्रेस 02", accompanied by a hand-symbol logo. The top red banner transitions from showing a single character "न" to the phrase "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की". As the sequence progresses, the bottom red banner displays scrolling news text, including "नीतीश समेत 9 विधायकों ने मंत्री पद की शपथ", while the top banner updates to "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". The "MANARODH" logo and a time stamp of "10:08 PM" are visible at the bottom.
